summary: First iteration testing for SKYN. Backend: all 13 pytest cases pass (health, Apple synthetic auth, /auth/me, /auth/logout, profile GET/PUT, reports POST/GET/list, per-user isolation, 401 enforcement). Frontend web preview loads splash and auto-routes to /auth screen. Playfair Display + DM Sans fonts loaded, bicolor (#0D0D0D background, #E8D5C0 accent) respected. Google button (testID auth-google-button) is tappable and correctly navigates to https://auth.emergentagent.com Emergent OAuth provider. GDPR consent block visible (testID auth-gdpr).

minor.issue: Returns 422 instead of 401 when body is empty and no auth header is provided (Pydantic body validation runs before Header dependency). Functionally fine because valid body + no auth still returns 401; flag only if strict auth-first ordering is desired.

action_items: Camera (expo-camera) and Apple Sign-In native screens cannot be exercised on the web preview - validate manually on iOS device/simulator.
Optional: re-order auth so POST /api/reports returns 401 before 422 when called without Bearer token (cosmetic; not blocking).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') which is deprecated in FastAPI - migrate to lifespan handlers when convenient (non-blocking).
Google OAuth endpoint depends on external Emergent provider; backend correctly returns 401 on invalid session_id and 502 if provider unreachable. Good.
MongoDB _id is correctly excluded from responses via projection {'_id': 0} on all reads.
Sessions auto-expire via TTL index on expires_at - good.
All interactive elements on auth screen carry testIDs (auth-google-button, auth-gdpr). Touch target 311x56 px - exceeds 44pt minimum.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (auth screen verified; camera/apple native deferred to device)

seed_data_creation: Test users created with TEST_ prefix via Apple synthetic session endpoint; reports prefixed with TEST_iso in recommendations. No production data touched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use POST /api/auth/apple/session with {apple_user_id: 'TEST_xxx'} to obtain a Bearer token without external dependencies. All MongoDB collections use TTL/index. Frontend /auth screen testIDs: auth-google-button, auth-gdpr. Splash auto-routes to /auth within ~2s. Camera (expo-camera) requires native permissions; only web fallback message is renderable on preview.
rca_of_issue: N/A - no functional issues found in this iteration.
